svg.title: Adolescent smartphone use: social media vs. education (India, 2024)
svg.desc: Adolescent smartphone use: social media vs. education (India, 2024). Source: ASER 2024 National Findings. Rural and national sample; correlation, not causation.

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #000000; stroke-width: 0.8; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square
